list.title: BASE_LEN
list.description: OID component count for lldpRemEntry base. 1.0.8802.1.1.2.1.4.1.1 = 10 components Column is at [10], index starts at [11].

list.title: COLUMN_MAP
list.description:
Column definitions within lldpRemEntry.

Key = column number (string, from OID position). Value = [fieldName, isSubtype].

Subtypes must be stored and looked up when the corresponding value column arrives. Since a single table walk returns results interleaved by index (not grouped by column), we collect subtypes into a separate dict and reference them during value decoding.

list.title: ConsoleEventPrinter
list.description:
Prints discovery events to console with optional color.

Usage: const printer = new ConsoleEventPrinter({ verbose: true }); printer.attach(emitter);

list.title: ConsoleEventPrinter#attach
list.description: Attach this printer to a DiscoveryEmitter. Subscribes to all event types.

list.title: Device#addNeighbor
list.description: Add neighbor with dedup (same remote_device + local_interface = skip).

list.title: DiscoveryEmitter
list.description: Extended EventEmitter with discovery-specific convenience methods and built-in stats tracking.

list.title: DiscoveryEngine#_createWalker
list.description: Create a walker for a target with given auth. Routes through STT proxy when --stt-file is configured. Caller is responsible for closing the walker.

list.title: DiscoveryEngine#_discoverWithLimit
list.description: Rate-limited single device discovery (used by crawl loop).

list.title: DiscoveryEngine#_generateTopologyMap
list.description: Generate topology map from discovered devices. Output format matches SC Map Viewer expectations.

list.title: DiscoveryEngine#_resolveTarget
list.description: Resolve target through STT proxy if configured. Returns { host, port } for walker connection.

list.title: DiscoveryEngine#crawl
list.description: Recursively discover network from seed devices.

list.title: DiscoveryEngine#discoverDevice
list.description: Discover a single device.

list.title: JsonEventPrinter#attach
list.description:
Print events as JSON lines to stderr.

Usage: const printer = new JsonEventPrinter(); printer.attach(emitter);

list.title: Neighbor.fromCdp
list.description: Create Neighbor from CDP collector output. Maps CDP-specific field names to Neighbor properties.

list.title: Neighbor.fromLldp
list.description: Create Neighbor from LLDP collector output. lldp.js passes: systemName, portId, managementAddress, chassisId, portDescription, systemDescription, capabilities (from Python from_lldp). Falls back to chassisId for remoteDevice when systemName is absent.

list.title: NetSnmpWalker
list.description: Create a walker for a single target.

list.title: NetSnmpWalker#close
list.description: Close the SNMP session (releases UDP socket). Must be called when done — net-snmp won't GC sessions.

list.title: NetSnmpWalker#get
list.description: GET a single scalar OID.

list.title: NetSnmpWalker#getMultiple
list.description: GET multiple scalar OIDs in one PDU.

list.title: NetSnmpWalker#walk
list.description: Walk a subtree (GETNEXT loop).

list.title: VENDOR_PATTERNS
list.description: Vendor detection patterns (case-insensitive). Evaluated in order — first match wins.

list.title: _fetchManagementAddresses
list.description:
Fetch management addresses from lldpRemManAddrTable. Updates neighborsRaw dict in place with 'management_address' field.

The management address is encoded in the OID itself: ............

For IPv4 (addrType=1), the last 4 OID components are the IP octets.

list.title: buildCredsFromArgs
list.description:
Build a credential provider from CLI arguments.

Supports: communities: Array of v2c community strings v3User: SNMPv3 username (triggers v3 mode) v3AuthPass: SNMPv3 auth password v3PrivPass: SNMPv3 priv password v3AuthProto: SNMPv3 auth protocol v3PrivProto: SNMPv3 priv protocol sshUser: SSH username sshPass: SSH password

list.title: buildFqdn
list.description:
Build FQDN from system name and domain(s).

If systemName already ends with a configured domain, returns as-is. If systemName looks like an FQDN (2+ dots), returns as-is. Otherwise appends the primary (first) domain.

list.title: buildInterfaceLookup
list.description: Build simple ifIndex → name lookup from interface table.

list.title: credToWalkerAuth
list.description: Convert a credential object to the auth shape expected by NetSnmpWalker.

list.title: decodeChassisId
list.description:
Decode LLDP chassis ID based on subtype.

Subtypes (LldpChassisIdSubtype): 1 = chassis component (entPhysicalAlias) 2 = interface alias (ifAlias) 3 = port component 4 = MAC address (most common) 5 = network address 6 = interface name (ifName) 7 = locally assigned

list.title: decodeInt
list.description: Safely convert SNMP value to integer.

list.title: decodeIp
list.description:
Decode binary data as IP address.

Handles two common formats:

  • 4 bytes: Direct IPv4 address
  • 5 bytes: Address family byte + IPv4 address (CDP format)

list.title: decodeMac
list.description: Decode binary data as MAC address.

list.title: decodePortId
list.description:
Decode LLDP port ID based on subtype.

Subtypes (LldpPortIdSubtype): 1 = interface alias (ifAlias) 2 = port component 3 = MAC address 4 = network address 5 = interface name (ifName) — most common 6 = agent circuit ID 7 = locally assigned

list.title: decodeString
list.description:
Safely convert SNMP value to string.

Handles Buffer (OctetString), native string, and numeric types. Strips null bytes and control characters.

list.title: detectDeviceVendor
list.description: Detect device vendor from sysDescr.

list.title: detectVendor
list.description: Detect device vendor from sysDescr string.

list.title: extractDevices
list.description: Extract devices from SC topology map.json. Handles the standard SC format: { "device-name": { "node_details": { "ip": "...", "platform": "..." }, "peers": {...} } }

list.title: extractHostname
list.description: Extract base hostname by stripping domain suffix.

list.title: extractHostnameFromPortDesc
list.description:
Try to extract hostname from LLDP port_description field.

Fallback for devices that don't advertise lldpRemSysName.

Common patterns: 'INT::hostname.domain::interface' -> hostname.domain 'TO::hostname::interface' -> hostname

list.title: extractIndexFromOid
list.description: Extract index portion from an OID.

list.title: generateYaml
list.description: Generate snmpproxy.yaml content.

list.title: getArpTable
list.description:
Get ARP table from device.

Queries ipNetToMediaPhysAddress for MAC-to-IP mappings.

list.title: getCdpNeighbors
list.description:
Get CDP neighbors from device.

Queries CISCO-CDP-MIB for neighbor information. Uses the interface table to resolve local ifIndex to interface names.

list.title: getCdpNeighborsRaw
list.description: Get raw CDP neighbor data as plain objects. Useful for debugging or custom processing.

list.title: getInterfaceTable
list.description:
Get interface table from device.

Queries IF-MIB for interface information, returning an object keyed by ifIndex for fast lookups during neighbor processing.

list.title: getInterfaceTableExtended
list.description:
Get extended interface table including status, MAC, speed, MTU.

Slower than getInterfaceTable due to additional walks.

list.title: getLldpLocalPortMap
list.description:
Build mapping of lldpLocPortNum → interface name.

CRITICAL: lldpLocPortNum in the remote table is NOT necessarily the same as ifIndex. This mapping is the correct way to resolve local port numbers to interface names.

list.title: getLldpNeighbors
list.description:
Get LLDP neighbors from device.

Queries LLDP-MIB lldpRemTable using single-table walk approach which works better on devices where column-by-column walks timeout (e.g., older Juniper).

list.title: getLldpNeighborsRaw
list.description: Get raw LLDP neighbor data as plain objects. Useful for debugging or custom processing.

list.title: getSysDescr
list.description: Quick sysDescr lookup.

list.title: getSysName
list.description: Quick sysName lookup.

list.title: getSystemInfo
list.description: Get system MIB information from device.

list.title: ipFromOidSuffix
list.description:
Extract IP address from the last N octets of an OID.

Used for ARP table where IP is encoded in OID index.

list.title: isIpAddress
list.description: Check if string looks like an IP address (IPv4).

list.title: isNetworkDevice
list.description: Check if sysDescr indicates a network device (vs server/host).

list.title: isValidIpv4
list.description: Check if string is a valid IPv4 address.

list.title: loadSttLookup
list.description: Generate a lookup map: device IP → localhost:port This is what the --stt-file flag uses at runtime.

list.title: lookupIpByMac
list.description: Look up IP address by MAC address. Normalizes MAC format before lookup.

list.title: normalizeMac
list.description:
Normalize MAC address to lowercase colon-separated format.

Handles: aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff, AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF, aabb.ccdd.eeff, aabbccddeeff

list.title: parallelLimit
list.description: Run async tasks with a concurrency limit. Returns Promise.allSettled-style results.

list.title: parseCdpCapabilities
list.description: Parse CDP capabilities bitmap.

list.title: parseCdpIndex
list.description:
Parse CDP cache index from OID.

CDP index format: ifIndex.deviceIndex

list.title: parseLldpCapabilities
list.description: Parse LLDP capabilities bitmap.

list.title: parseLldpIndex
list.description:
Parse LLDP remote table index from OID.

LLDP index format: timeMark.localPortNum.remIndex

list.title: resolveInterfaceName
list.description: Resolve ifIndex to interface name. Falls back to 'ifIndex_N'.

list.title: sendEvent
list.description: Send an event to the renderer. JSON round-trips the data to strip anything Electron's structured clone can't handle (Buffers, Maps, circular refs from net-snmp walker, etc.).

list.title: shouldExclude
list.description:
Check if device should be excluded from discovery.

Uses case-insensitive substring matching against exclusion patterns.

list.title: snmpV2cCredential
list.description: Build an SNMPv2c credential object.

list.title: snmpV3Credential
list.description: Build an SNMPv3 credential object.

list.title: sshCredential
list.description: Build an SSH credential object.
